description: Redirect handling in resolve_redirects() doesn't validate URL schemes, potentially allowing unsafe redirects to file:// or other protocols
suggested_fix: Add URL scheme validation to prevent redirects to unsafe protocols like file://, ftp://, etc.

description: Some session methods don't properly handle or validate timeout parameters, which could lead to hanging requests
suggested_fix: Add timeout validation and default timeout handling for all network operations

description: Response content handling doesn't always properly close file-like objects, potentially causing resource leaks
suggested_fix: Ensure all file-like objects are properly closed using context managers or try-finally blocks

description: Basic authentication credentials can be exposed in URLs when using netrc or URL-based authentication
suggested_fix: Warn users about credential exposure in URLs and provide secure alternatives

description: Cookie handling doesn't enforce Secure, HttpOnly, or SameSite attributes by default
suggested_fix: Add options to enforce secure cookie attributes and warn about insecure cookie usage

description: Session state (cookies, auth, headers) can become inconsistent after certain operations like redirects
suggested_fix: Add session state validation and consistency checks after state-modifying operations

description: Response content decoding doesn't handle all edge cases of malformed encoding headers
suggested_fix: Improve error handling for malformed or conflicting encoding headers

description: Connection pooling configuration is not easily tunable for high-performance applications
suggested_fix: Expose more connection pool configuration options at the adapter level

description: Error handling in redirect chains could be more robust, especially for network errors during redirects
suggested_fix: Add better error recovery and retry logic for failed redirects

description: Large response bodies are loaded entirely into memory by default, which can cause memory issues
suggested_fix: Add streaming response handling by default for large responses or provide better memory management options
